message:
feat(storage): add read helpers for archive views

New functions for reading from the git archive:
- find_commit_for_path(): maps a file path to its introducing commit
- get_commits_by_author(): author-filtered commit log for whois views
- get_commit_for_message(): convenience for message-to-commit mapping
- read_message_file(): parses ---json frontmatter + markdown body
- list_message_files(): recursive .md file listing sorted by mtime
- list_agent_inbox/outbox(): per-agent message file listing
- list_archive_agents(): enumerate agents with profiles
- read_agent_profile(): read agent profile.json from archive
- 7 new tests (36 total), all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
